flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Randolph Community College fell 65% between 2006 and 2009 (42.8% → 15.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Randolph Community College fell 29% between 1998 and 2001 ($4.8k → $3.4k).
